heading: Control by Commission; review of decisions
label: 361 Control by Commission; review of decisions
text: Nothing in this subchapter shall be interpreted as lessening in any degree the control of the Commission over all matters connected with the radio equipment and its operation on shipboard and its decision and determination in regard to the radio requirements, installations, or exemptions from prescribed radio requirements shall be final, subject only to review in accordance with law.
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see section 16 of act , set out as a note under .May 20, 1937May 20, 1937section 351 of this title
